Localization.Description: The ms-msdt protocol was used to exploit vulnerability CVE-2022-30190 (Follina) in Microsoft Support Diagnostic Tool (MSDT)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} exploited vulnerability CVE-2022-30190 (Follina) using process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Process {subject.process.name} created named pipe {object.name}. This may indicate possible exploitation of vulnerability CVE_2022_30190 (Follina) on host {event_src.host}.
